creator: handy@physics.montana.edu
text:
In what has become a rich and time-honored tradition, the windowmaker
people have released a new version of wmaker while I'm on travel.  As
my laptop is in the shop, this upgrade is being done in the blind, on
a 2.2-STABLE box: caveat emptor.  However, may the buyer also note
it'll work on a 2.2 box.

Fix: I did this blind -- it patches, it compiles, I'm not absolutely sure it 
runs.  This is a popular port, though, so I thought I'd get it out in a
timely manner for all my fans.  I'll check it over on my 3.x box when I 
get home in a few days, but I imagine this should work fine.

Files removed:  pkg/patch-ab
